# Farzad Roozbahani

> SEO Specialist & Developer based in Tehran, Iran. Personal resume and portfolio site.

Farzad Roozbahani is an SEO specialist and developer. He currently works with RugMaster Pty Ltd (an Australian handmade rug and runner importer) managing SEO and digital marketing end to end — keyword strategy, technical audits, and content. His background includes WordPress development (PCMOD, Calistu Trading, Tosee Ertebat Ramaan) and earlier training in graphic design and motion (Illustration and Video Special Effects, Avini High School). He also writes Python and works with Arduino/C++.

## Pages

- [Resume / portfolio](https://feris.ir/): Full profile — about, work experience, skills, soft skills, education, languages, interests, and contact details.
- [Structured content source](https://feris.ir/content.md): The plain-markdown data file that drives every section of the site (experience entries, skill lists, education, languages, interests, contact). This is the most reliable machine-readable source for accurate, up-to-date details.

## Skills

SEO & Marketing: Google Search Console, Google Analytics, Google Ads, Google Trends, Technical SEO, On-page SEO, Screaming Frog, Moz, Wincher, Keyword Research, Schema.
Development: WordPress, HTML, CSS, Git, Ubuntu.
Design & Motion: Photoshop, Illustrator, After Effects, Premiere, Corel, Figma, Maya.
Programming: Python, Arduino C++.

## Contact

- Email: farzad.roozbahanii@gmail.com
- Location: Tehran, Iran
